_comment: UX-army camera-feed library. Each feed loops at rtsp://localhost:8554/<name>. Files live in dev/feeds/ (gitignored); run testing/harness/fetch_feeds.sh to (re)download. Personas pick the feed matching their scene; two personas may share a feed but should name/frame their cameras differently.

front-door.scene: people approaching one at a time, entryway framing

street.scene: street with pedestrians, a cyclist and cars passing

indoor-room.scene: indoor room with people moving around

yard.scene: outdoor work zone, person moving through a yard-like area

lobby.scene: indoor communal room, several seated/moving people

sidewalk.scene: pedestrians walking toward camera, faces visible (face-recognition material)

uxcam.scene: legacy looping CCTV street clip (dev/sample-cctv.mp4), kept for continuity with pre-library cameras
